The '''Proliferans''' were a species of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] non-[[humanoid]]s who resembled large red ants. They were excellent at digging, often using their skills to dig under enemy forces and waylay them when they got close. They had their own empire, known as the [[Proliferan Empire]] which was in turn ruled by a monarch. At the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ruler was [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Yentuki]].
